title: chilopsis linearis subsp. linearis
intro: Chilopsis linearis subsp. linearis, also known as the Mexican trumpet vine or desert trumpet vine, is a flowering plant species within the family Bignoniaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, colds, and digestive problems, thanks to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Chilopsis linearis subsp. linearis can be prepared as a tea or tincture for its herbal remedies, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
